pages.title: Skybrand Feather
pages.text: A remnant of descent, deflection, and violent landing. The Feather starts as protection from falling and becomes a weaponized relationship with height.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Completely negates fall damage and grants a chance to nullify incoming projectiles. It already encourages fearlessness with terrain.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): The projectile negation becomes more reliable, and the remnant's control over motion feels cleaner and more deliberate.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): The Feather grants controlled slow-falling while airborne and stores the force of meaningful falls. Landing releases that force in a burst around the bearer.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): The gust becomes stronger and nearby enemies are slowed when thrown back.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): Both the landing burst and projectile evasion sharpen further.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): The Feather reaches its peak: the strongest landing shock, the best projectile negation, and the cleanest mastery of descent.
